item.title: Banglalink launches free IMO access amid Middle East crisis
item.description: In response to the ongoing tensions and security uncertainties in parts of the Middle East, Banglalink has announced a special initiative to help its customers stay connected with their loved ones in the region, reinforcing its care-driven philosophy, “Banglalink – For You.”The Mi

item.title: Bangladesh ‘saddened’ by killing of Iran’s Khamenei
item.description: Bangladesh has said it is “saddened” by the killing of Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, issuing a fresh statement after criticism over its earlier response. In a statement released on Monday, the Ministry of Foreign Affairs said the government was saddened to learn t

item.title: Khamenei's death brings Khomeini's grandson into focus
item.description: A grandson of Ayatollah Ruhollah Khomeini, the late founder of the Islamic Republic of Iran, is likely to figure prominently in the deliberations of the clerics who will determine who replaces Ayatollah Ali Khamenei as Supreme Leader. The killing of Khamenei, 86, in a US-Israeli attack has brought

item.title: LPG prices stay unchanged for March
item.description: The Bangladesh Energy Regulatory Commission (BERC) has decided to keep the price of 12kg liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) cylinders unchanged at Tk 1,341 for the month of March. The new rates will be effective from 6pm Monday, according to a notice issued by the commission. The price remains at the

item.title: IGP orders zero tolerance against extortion
item.description: Newly-appointed Inspector General of Police (IGP) Md. Ali Hossain Fakir has instructed field-level police officers across the country to adopt a zero tolerance policy against extortion, robbery and drug-related crimes. The directive was issued during an online exchange of views with police su

item.title: 3 Deputy Press Secretaries to PM appointed
item.description: Mostafa Julfikar Hasan, Md Sujauddoula and Md Jahidul Islam have been made deputy press secretaries to Prime Minister Tarique Rahman. The Ministry of Public Administration issued separate gazette notifications on Monday confirming their contractual appointment. According to the notification, Most

item.title: United Finance observes Financial Literacy Day 2026
item.description: United Finance has commemorated Financial Literacy Day 2026 through a series of awareness sessions held simultaneously across its 23 branches nationwide. Entrepreneurs, customers, and local stakeholders participated actively in discussions designed to strengthen understanding of essential financia

item.title: Fintech Pine Labs to launch stablecoin payments outside India, CEO says
item.description: Pine Labs will launch a stablecoin-backed prepaid card across nine countries in the Middle East, Africa and Southeast Asia by the end of April, the fintech firm's chief executive told Reuters, marking the first attempt by an Indian payments major to tap the fast‑growing market. The Temasek and Pea

item.title: BB chief directs ‘Fast Track’ recovery of laundered money
item.description: Newly appointed Bangladesh Bank (BB) Governor Md Mostaqur Rahman today (Monday) held a meeting with a consultant from the Stolen Asset Recovery Task Force to accelerate the return of laundered funds. The primary objective of the meeting was to enhance the recovery process and ensure that eff

item.title: Iran conflict disrupts global shipping as tankers are stranded, damaged
item.description: Insurance companies are cancelling war risk coverage for vessels in the Gulf as the widening Iran conflict disrupted shipping, leaving at least four tankers damaged, a seafarer killed and 150 ships stranded around the Strait of Hormuz. Shipping through the strait between Iran and Oman, which carri

item.title: Sonali Bank Chairman Muslim Chowdhury resigns
item.description: Mohammad Muslim Chowdhury, the chairman of the state-owned Sonali Bank, has stepped down from his position. He submitted his resignation to the Financial Institutions Division of the Ministry of Finance on Monday. Muslim said, “I have tried to steer the bank toward a stronger position. Havi

item.title: Tehran hospital evacuated after explosions nearby, WHO says
item.description: The World Health Organization said on Monday that a hospital in Iran’s capital has been evacuated after explosions nearby and that it is working to verify reports that three other medical centres in the country had been hit since the start of the US-Israeli air war against Iran on Feb 28. &l
